title: What technologies do you use?
content: I specialize in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS frameworks. My backend stack typically includes Node.js and PostgreSQL.

title: Are you available for freelance work?
content: Yes, I am currently accepting new projects and collaborations. Feel free to reach out via the contact form.

title: How do you handle project management?
content: I use Agile methodologies, maintaining transparency through regular updates and clear communication channels.
